themes: Long wait times across a mostly Manager-level backlog signal a systemic need for faster Product touchpoints, with nearly half of contacts waiting more than 150 days and several exceeding 300 days.

Multi-contact accounts—including Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Avenue5 Residential, Ford, Anytime Fitness, 29th Street Living, Vetcor, and Willow Bridge—suggest unresolved or recurring product pain points that may benefit from a single consolidated conversation per account.

The backlog skews heavily toward multi-location franchise and property-management businesses, pointing to shared themes around location-level reporting efficiency, workflow scalability, and time savings as the most likely drivers of these product conversations.
